scope: Fractal Bitcoin child coinbase reward address -> pool identity registry for merge-mined child-miner attribution.

source.name: project-maintained fractal child-payout registry
source.notes: Maps a child-chain coinbase payout/reward address to a project-stable pool slug, derived from authenticated AuxPoW linkage: each address consistently co-occurs with one pool's independently-attributed Bitcoin parent coinbase across many merge-mined blocks. Pools that rotate their child payout address per block (notably ViaBTC on Namecoin/Syscoin) cannot be pinned to a single address and are intentionally omitted. Shared/protocol/relay outputs that appear across many pools are excluded.

evidence.btc_parent_pool_reconciliation: 2218 active merge-mined blocks carry this address; their independently BTC-coinbase-attributed parents reconcile to {'antpool': 2218} (purity 1.000).
175 active merge-mined blocks carry this address; their independently BTC-coinbase-attributed parents reconcile to {'braiins-pool': 175} (purity 1.000).
1570 active merge-mined blocks carry this address; their independently BTC-coinbase-attributed parents reconcile to {'f2pool': 1570} (purity 1.000).
evidence.note: matches existing fb-1342257 child-payout test vector
